appflow.flow.s3destinationproperties.Cfn: The properties that are applied when Amazon S3 is used as a destination.

appflow.flow.s3destinationproperties.Buc.Description: The Amazon S3 bucket name in which Amazon AppFlow places the transferred data.
The object key for the destination bucket in which Amazon AppFlow places the files.

appflow.flow.s3destinationproperties.S3O.Description: The configuration that determines how Amazon AppFlow should format the flow output data when Amazon S3 is used as the destination.
